brief_summary: 2D grid plotting keycap profiles on sculpt (x: uniform → row-sculpted) and height (y: low → tall). Filled amber circles for the four covered profiles: Cherry (low, sculpted), OEM (slightly taller, sculpted), SA (tall, sculpted right), MT3 (tall, sculpted left). Hollow outline circles for uniform family — KAT, DSA, XDA — in the uniform half. Bottom strip surfaces the article's default recommendation: buy Cherry unless there is a specific reason not to.
data_sources: keycap-profiles-compared.mdx § 'The two axes that actually matter' — 'Two axes do most of the work: sculpt ... and height'
keycap-profiles-compared.mdx § 'Uniform profiles, briefly' — 'DSA, KAT, and XDA all use the same cap shape on every row'
keycap-profiles-compared.mdx § 'What to actually buy first' — 'Buy Cherry unless there is a specific reason not to'
